title: Dark Orion
description: Abandoned by the gods, you now stand alone in a world overrun by fallen beasts.
body:
![Dark Orion Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e12475df8e31ae925936c1fe3c395e4c18f4d56c_0.webp)

Abandoned by the **gods**, you now stand alone in a world overrun by **fallen beasts**.

**Dark Orion** is a dark fantasy mod that adds new creatures, weapons, armors and much more.

Created by Jackman & DinoSoup @ Breadworks
